name: VET-1
title: agent definitions say re-read philosophy/work-guide at start but give no paths
description: rabbit-breeder.md and rabbit-vet.md both instruct the agent to 'honor philosophy.md and work-guide.md — re-read them at the start of each task' but neither file gives the paths. In practice the content is already injected via CLAUDE.md @-imports, so this instruction is dead/misleading. An agent that takes it literally could try to Read those files (path guessable: .claude/philosophy.md), or could silently skip. The instruction should either be removed (CLAUDE.md handles injection) or replaced with an explicit path reference. Related: R6 policy-block.sh is also redundant for same-repo agents but remains useful for cross-repo dispatches.

history.note: removed misleading re-read instruction from rabbit-vet.md and rabbit-breeder.md; replaced with accurate note that CLAUDE.md @-imports already inject the content
